g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain what IntStream.range and the map function do in newPseudoRandomIterator')
sendPrompt('Explain the AgeIteratorWrapper class in detail — what does it wrap and why?')
sendPrompt('Explain the createdIterators map — what type is it and how is it used?')
sendPrompt('Explain how iteratorForRegion works — what does Optional.ofNullable do here?')
sendPrompt('What happens inside hasNext() and next() — what does the closed check do?')
sendPrompt('What does next() do and why does it delegate?')
sendPrompt('When is close() called and what does setting closed=true do?')
